source: NYC TLC Yellow Taxi Trip Records

fields.name: VendorID
fields.description: A code indicating the TPEP provider that provided the record.

fields.name: tpep_pickup_datetime
fields.description: The date and time when the meter was engaged.

fields.name: tpep_dropoff_datetime
fields.description: The date and time when the meter was disengaged.

fields.name: passenger_count
fields.description: The number of passengers in the vehicle.

fields.name: trip_distance
fields.description: The elapsed trip distance in miles reported by the taximeter.

fields.name: RatecodeID
fields.description: The final rate code in effect at the end of the trip.

fields.name: store_and_fwd_flag
fields.description: This flag indicates whether the trip record was held in vehicle memory before sending to the vendor, aka "store and forward," because the vehicle did not have a connection to the server.

codes.N: not a store and forward trip

fields.name: PULocationID
fields.description: TLC Taxi Zone in which the taximeter was engaged.

fields.name: DOLocationID
fields.description: TLC Taxi Zone in which the taximeter was disengaged.

fields.name: payment_type
fields.description: A numeric code signifying how the passenger paid for the trip.

fields.name: fare_amount
fields.description: The time-and-distance fare calculated by the meter.

fields.name: extra
fields.description: Miscellaneous extras and surcharges.

fields.name: mta_tax
fields.description: Tax that is automatically triggered based on the metered rate in use.

fields.name: tip_amount
fields.description: Tip amount. This field is automatically populated for credit card tips. Cash tips are not included.

fields.name: tolls_amount
fields.description: Total amount of all tolls paid in trip.

fields.name: improvement_surcharge
fields.description: Improvement surcharge assessed trips at the flag drop. The improvement surcharge began being levied in 2015.

fields.name: total_amount
fields.description: The total amount charged to passengers. Does not include cash tips.

fields.name: congestion_surcharge
fields.description: Total amount collected in trip for NYS congestion surcharge.

fields.name: airport_fee
fields.description: For pick up only at LaGuardia and John F. Kennedy Airports.

fields.name: cbd_congestion_fee
fields.description: Per-trip charge for MTA's Congestion Relief Zone starting Jan. 5, 2025.
